statement: In every magma, Equation 1118 (`x = y * ((y * (x * z)) * w)`) implies Equation 3486 (`x * x = y * ((y * y) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0793
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op (op y (op x z)) w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x x) = (op y (op (op y y) z))
